sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70391" key="neostaqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεο-στᾰθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἵστημι</etym>) <sense id="n70391.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">newly settled,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δῆμος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.321d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
